meaning: n.形容枯槁(或脾气暴躁)的老妇人,名声不好的老泼妇
examples: Harridan! You'll see no mercy from me.
I've always considered myself a pretty easy-going parent, and yet here they are telling me I'm a nay-saying harridan.
Buck, a bizarre cross between Peter Pan and Pee-wee Herman, lives a lollipop-sucking, perpetually prepubescent life with his harridan mother in a small town in central California.
